we got feedback from industry that the practice

at the proposed level.

source_metadata.title: 2025/11/06 - PP
source_metadata.description:
Thursday, 6 November 2025 | Primary Production
Briefing on glyphosate residue limits
Ministry for Primary Industries
Vincent Arbuckle, Deputy Director-General, NZ Food Safety
Warren Hughes, Principal Adviser Acvm
Karen Booth, Manager Acvm Programmes & Appraisals
Jefferson Fowles, Principal Adviser Toxicology
